proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 == 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_022 == 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_024 == 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_BRAF` mean was -0.80470 in `feature_009 == 1` lines (n=5574) versus -0.24950 in other lines; effect=-0.55520, z=-111.15.
`dependency_EGFR` mean was -0.60105 in `feature_022 == 1` lines (n=3880) versus -0.25241 in other lines; effect=-0.34864, z=-60.31.
`dependency_ERBB2` mean was -0.68559 in `feature_024 == 1` lines (n=4890) versus -0.25347 in other lines; effect=-0.43212, z=-81.69.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_014 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_027 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_018 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `feature_018 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KRAS` mean was -0.55941 in `feature_014 == 1` lines (n=11842) versus -0.25196 in other lines; effect=-0.30746, z=-83.28.
`dependency_RIT1` mean was -0.35272 in `feature_027 == 1` lines (n=4560) versus -0.25720 in other lines; effect=-0.09552, z=-17.74.
`dependency_RPL11` mean was -0.36139 in `feature_018 == 1` lines (n=8055) versus -0.25234 in other lines; effect=-0.10906, z=-25.54.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) and high `feature_023` (`feature_023 >= 5.669`) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_POLR2A` mean was -0.49717 in high-`feature_016` lines (n=12577) versus -0.39283 in other lines; effect=-0.10435, z=-28.86.
`dependency_TMED10` mean was -0.28160 in high-`feature_016` lines (n=12577) versus -0.24473 in other lines; effect=-0.03688, z=-10.19.
`dependency_DHX9` mean was -0.38919 in the high-`feature_016`/high-`feature_023` subgroup (n=3320) versus -0.32972 in other lines; effect=-0.05948, z=-9.54.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011 == "colorectal"` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_035 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_035 == 0`.
Cell lines with high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.72035 in colorectal lines (n=5816) versus -0.25240 in non-colorectal lines; effect=-0.46796, z=-53.34.
`dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.5447 in `feature_035 == 1` lines (n=9285) versus -0.2526 in other lines; effect=-0.29212, z=-44.7.
`dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.4694 in high-`feature_028` lines (n=12508) versus -0.2526 in other lines; effect=-0.21681, z=-40.1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `dependency_KIF18A` signal is stronger in the subgroup with `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_035 == 1` than in all other cell lines.
The `dependency_KIF18A` signal is stronger in the subgroup with `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) than in all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.94253 in colorectal/`feature_035 == 1` lines (n=3925) versus -0.25268 in other lines; effect=-0.68985, z=-65.38.
`dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.92880 in colorectal/high-`feature_028` lines (n=4006) versus -0.25266 in other lines; effect=-0.67614, z=-64.39.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is the complete intersection `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, and high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`), which has more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.
Within `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_035 == 1` cell lines, high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) makes `dependency_KIF18A` more negative than lower `feature_028`.
Within `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) cell lines, `feature_035 == 1` makes `dependency_KIF18A` more negative than `feature_035 == 0`.
Within `feature_035 == 1` and high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) cell lines, `feature_011 == "colorectal"` makes `dependency_KIF18A` more negative than non-colorectal lineage.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -1.11187 in the full colorectal/`feature_035 == 1`/high-`feature_028` subgroup (n=3133) versus -0.25301 in all other lines; effect=-0.85885, z=-79.07.
Within colorectal/`feature_035 == 1` lines, high `feature_028` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.11187 (n=3133) versus -0.27267 for lower `feature_028` (n=792); effect=-0.83919, z=-51.13.
Within colorectal/high-`feature_028` lines, `feature_035 == 1` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.11187 (n=3133) versus -0.27183 for `feature_035 == 0` (n=873); effect=-0.84004, z=-51.75.
Within `feature_035 == 1`/high-`feature_028` lines, colorectal lineage had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.11187 (n=3133) versus -0.25282 for non-colorectal lines (n=2494); effect=-0.85905, z=-66.76.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `dependency_KIF18A` effect is suppressed when `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_035 == 1` but `feature_028 < 0.819`; this incomplete subgroup is not more dependent than other cell lines.

The `dependency_KIF18A` effect is suppressed when `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_028 >= 0.819` but `feature_035 == 0`; this incomplete subgroup is not more dependent than other cell lines.
The `dependency_KIF18A` effect is suppressed outside colorectal lineage even when `feature_035 == 1` and `feature_028 >= 0.819`; this incomplete subgroup is not more dependent than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: The colorectal/`feature_035 == 1`/low-`feature_028` subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.27267 (n=792) versus -0.30738 in other lines; effect=+0.03471, indicating no stronger dependency and the opposite signed direction.
The colorectal/`feature_035 == 0`/high-`feature_028` subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.27183 (n=873) versus -0.30745 in other lines; effect=+0.03563, again opposite to a dependency signal.

The non-colorectal/`feature_035 == 1`/high-`feature_028` subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.25282 (n=2494) versus -0.30967 in other lines; effect=+0.05685, so the dependency is suppressed without colorectal lineage.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic heterogeneity screen confirms that `dependency_BRAF` remains mainly defined by `feature_009 == 1`; the top two-feature subgroup `feature_009 == 1` and `feature_020 == 0` is more negative than other lines but does not improve on the single-feature effect.
A systematic heterogeneity screen identifies `feature_022 == 1` with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.828`) as a slightly stronger `dependency_EGFR` subgroup than `feature_022 == 1` alone.

A systematic heterogeneity screen confirms that `dependency_ERBB2` remains mainly defined by `feature_024 == 1`, with `feature_024 == 1` and `feature_026 >= 1.0` remaining strongly dependent but not stronger than the single-feature effect.
A systematic heterogeneity screen confirms that `dependency_KRAS` remains mainly defined by `feature_014 == 1`, with `feature_014 == 1` and `feature_020 == 0` still more negative than other lines.

analyses.result_summary: Among screened BRAF subgroups, `feature_009 == 1` and `feature_020 == 0` had mean -0.8033 (n=4877) versus -0.2582 in other lines; effect=-0.54502, similar to but not stronger than `feature_009 == 1` alone.
The top EGFR pair `feature_022 == 1` and `feature_016 >= 0.828` had mean -0.6207 (n=1954) versus -0.2656 in other lines; effect=-0.35507, modestly stronger than `feature_022 == 1` alone.
The ERBB2 pair `feature_024 == 1` and `feature_026 >= 1.0` had mean -0.7054 (n=2403) versus -0.2751 in other lines; effect=-0.43033, essentially the same as `feature_024 == 1` alone.
The KRAS pair `feature_014 == 1` and `feature_020 == 0` had mean -0.5600 (n=9664) versus -0.2684 in other lines; effect=-0.29162, supporting the broad `feature_014 == 1` dependency pattern.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic heterogeneity screen identifies `feature_027 == 1` and high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.828`) as a stronger `dependency_RIT1` subgroup than `feature_027 == 1` alone.
A systematic heterogeneity screen identifies high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) and high `feature_026` (`feature_026 >= 1.0`) as the strongest tested `dependency_TMED10` subgroup.
A systematic heterogeneity screen identifies high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) and high `feature_023` (`feature_023 >= 5.669`) as the strongest tested `dependency_DHX9` subgroup.
A systematic heterogeneity screen confirms that high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) is the dominant `dependency_POLR2A` subgroup and remains strong with `feature_027 == 0`.
A systematic heterogeneity screen identifies `feature_018 == 1` with high `feature_003` (`feature_003 >= 0.428`) as a strong `dependency_RPL11` subgroup.

analyses.result_summary: The RIT1 pair `feature_027 == 1` and `feature_016 >= 0.828` had mean -0.3663 (n=2296) versus -0.2611 in other lines; effect=-0.10525, slightly stronger than `feature_027 == 1` alone.
The TMED10 pair `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_026 >= 1.0` had mean -0.2917 (n=6365) versus -0.2485 in other lines; effect=-0.04323.
The DHX9 pair `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_023 >= 5.669` had mean -0.38919 (n=3320) versus -0.32972 in other lines; effect=-0.05948.
The POLR2A pair `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_027 == 0` had mean -0.5003 (n=11421) versus -0.3950 in other lines; effect=-0.10527, very close to the high-`feature_016` main effect.
The RPL11 pair `feature_018 == 1` and `feature_003 >= 0.428` had mean -0.36465 (n=7797) versus -0.25240 in other lines; effect=-0.11225, close to the `feature_018 == 1` main effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_BRAF`: `feature_009 == 1` cell lines are more BRAF-dependent than `feature_009 == 0` cell lines.
Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_EGFR`: `feature_022 == 1` cell lines, especially when `feature_016 >= 0.828`, are more EGFR-dependent than other cell lines.
Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_ERBB2`: `feature_024 == 1` cell lines are more ERBB2-dependent than `feature_024 == 0` cell lines.
Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_KRAS`: `feature_014 == 1` cell lines are more KRAS-dependent than `feature_014 == 0` cell lines.
Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_RIT1`: `feature_027 == 1` cell lines, with modest strengthening when `feature_016 >= 0.828`, are more RIT1-dependent than other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_KIF18A`: the complete intersection `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, and `feature_028 >= 0.819` is much more KIF18A-dependent than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_TMED10`: high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) with high `feature_026` (`feature_026 >= 1.0`) has slightly more negative TMED10 dependency than other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_DHX9`: high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) with high `feature_023` (`feature_023 >= 5.669`) has more negative DHX9 dependency than other cell lines.
Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_POLR2A`: high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) cell lines are more POLR2A-dependent than lower-`feature_016` lines.
Final best-supported subgroup for `dependency_RPL11`: `feature_018 == 1` cell lines, with only modest strengthening from high `feature_003`, are more RPL11-dependent than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Final support is the iteration 1 `feature_009 == 1` contrast for `dependency_BRAF`: effect=-0.55520, p<1e-300.
Final support is the `feature_022 == 1` main contrast and the `feature_022 == 1`/`feature_016 >= 0.828` pair for `dependency_EGFR`: pair effect=-0.35507, p<1e-300.
Final support is the iteration 1 `feature_024 == 1` contrast for `dependency_ERBB2`: effect=-0.43212, p<1e-300.
Final support is the iteration 2 `feature_014 == 1` contrast for `dependency_KRAS`: effect=-0.30746, p<1e-300.
Final support is the `feature_027 == 1`/`feature_016 >= 0.828` pair for `dependency_RIT1`: effect=-0.10525, p<1e-300.
Final support is the complete KIF18A triple subgroup `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, `feature_028 >= 0.819`: effect=-0.85885, p<1e-300.
Final support is the `feature_016 >= 0.964`/`feature_026 >= 1.0` pair for `dependency_TMED10`: effect=-0.04323, p<1e-300.
Final support is the `feature_016 >= 0.964`/`feature_023 >= 5.669` pair for `dependency_DHX9`: effect=-0.05948, p<1e-300.
Final support is the high-`feature_016` contrast for `dependency_POLR2A`: effect=-0.10435, p<1e-300.
Final support is the `feature_018 == 1`/high-`feature_003` pair and the `feature_018 == 1` main effect for `dependency_RPL11`: pair effect=-0.11225, p<1e-300.
